records.ety: [L. epicus, Gr. <?/, from <?/ a word, speech, tale, song; akin to L. vox voice: cf. F. pique. See Voice.]

defs: Narrated in a grand style; pertaining to or designating a kind of narrative poem, usually called an heroic poem, in which real or fictitious events, usually the achievements of some hero, are narrated in an elevated style.
quotes: The epic poem treats of one great, complex action, in a grand style and with fullness of detail.

defs: An epic or heroic poem. See Epic, a.
